arts.ttl: Club in picture for Crystal Palace player, performances ‘didn’t go unnoticed’ – Deal ‘not easy’ for January
arts.sum: Eberechi Eze has consistently been one of the standout players at Crystal Palace. The attacking midfielder managed 11 goals and six assists last season and has four goals and two assists to his name this season. Eche’s displays for Crystal Palace have seen him attract the attention of several clubs and Italian journalist Niccolò Ceccarini, The post Club in picture for Crystal Palace player, performances ‘didn’t go unnoticed’ – Deal ‘not easy’ for January appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Premier League: 10 talking points from the weekend’s action
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Enzo Fernández hits form, Newcastle have lost their shooting boots and Brighton rue a chance missed Late-2024 Liverpool are reminiscent of the late-2019 team that eventually won the club’s first league title in 30 years. Back then, a 3-1 home win against Manchester City put Jürgen Klopp’s side eight points above second place, and nine above City. In 2024, they are nine points above second and 11 above City – with, we hope, no pandemic to interrupt the season. There are eight players from that squad still at Liverpool, and if the football is more measured under Arne Slot, Sunday’s potential knockout blow was achieved in the heavy-metal fashion of a Klopp team. “I knew Jürgen left the team in a very good place,” said the diplomatic Dutchman afterwards. arts.ttl: Juventus eye Ipswich striker Delap - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Juventus are considering moves for Liam Delap and Joshua Zirkzee, Paris St-Germain may offer Randal Kolo Muani in part exchange for Christopher Nkunku, plus more.
